title: Ensure Security Center Network, Host and Security log analysis is  enabled

input_row.title: Ensure Security Center Network, Host and Security log analysis is  enabled
input_row.description: Log Service collects log entries of Security Center for security logs, network logs, and host logs, with 14 subtypes, including 1. Security logs a. Vulnerability logs b. Baseline logs c. Security alerting logs 2. Security logs a. Vulnerability logs b. Baseline logs c. Security alerting logs 3. Network logs a. DNS logs b. Local DNS logs c. Network session logs d. Web logs 4. Server logs a. Process initiation logs b. Network connection logs c. System logon logs 69 | P a g e d. Brute-force cracking logs e. Process snapshots f. Account snapshots g. Port listening snapshots The Log Service supports real-time log query and analysis over the logs mentioned above. The query results are centrally displayed in dashboards.
input_row.rationale: The Security Center log shall be enabled to collect and store real-time security log, network log and server log to better protect your assets in real time.
input_row.audit: Perform the following ensure the Cloud Firewall access and security log is enabled: 1. Logon to Security Center Console. 2. In the left-side navigation pane, select Investigation > Log Analysis to enter the Activate Log Analysis page. 3. In the Activate Log Analysis page, ensure the switch for the specific log type are turned on. 4. Ensure the log volume usage indicator is not exhausted.
input_row.remediation: Perform the following ensure the Cloud Firewall access and security log is enabled: 1. Logon to Security Center Console. 2. In the left-side navigation pane, select Investigation > Log Analysis to enter the Activate Log Analysis page. 3. Click Active Now on the Activate log Analysis page. 4. On the Purchase page, check Full Log and configure some other settings as needed. 5. Click Purchase Now. 6. In the Activate log Analysis click Activate log Analysis to complete the authorization. 7. In the log type menu, check the log types to enable the log collection. 70 | P a g e
input_row.impact: Extra charge will incur by enabling the log.
input_row.additional_information: Only Security Center Enterprise Edition supports full log service and provides features for accurate real-time log querying and log analysis.

step1_initial_assessment:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Manual

**MANUAL STEPS:**
1. Log on to the Alibaba Cloud Management Console and navigate to the Security Center Console.
2. In the left-side navigation pane, select "Investigation" > "Log Analysis" to enter the "Activate Log Analysis" page.
3. Verify that the switch for each log type (security logs, network logs, and server logs) is turned on.
4. Check the log volume usage indicator to ensure it is not exhausted. 

**What to verify/validate:**
- Ensure that all relevant log types (Security logs, Network logs, Server logs) are activated.
- Confirm that there are no usage limits breached for log storage.

**Expected secure configuration:**
- All switches for the various log types should be in the "On" position.
- The log volume usage indicator should clearly indicate that there is remaining capacity.

**How to confirm compliance:**
- If all log types are enabled and within usage limits, then the compliance is confirmed. 
- If any log type is disabled or the usage limit is exceeded, further action will need to be taken to address these issues.
